name: release-safety
description: Provider-neutral release-safety toolkit. Proves a fix is actually deployed to the target environment (not just merged) by reconciling the deployed commit SHA to the environment; diffs env-driven secrets between source and target before promotion; detects migration drift; and runs risky cutovers and migrations through a discover -> backup -> stage -> additive-then-cutover -> archive skeleton with destructive/CASCADE safeguards. Works across any Git host, CI system, and hosting provider.
